name: Collateral portfolio code (initial margin)
description: Unique code(s) to identify the collateral portfolio(s) of initial margin in which the transaction is collateralised.
optionalityRules: Required in a transaction report (NEWT, MODI, CORR, REVI) if applicable (Paragraph 693).
Required in collateral reports (MARU, CORR) if applicable (Paragraph 695).
Required if Collateral portfolio indicator is True and Collateral portfolio code (variation margin) is NOAP (Paragraph 698(b)).
May be optionally reported if Collateral portfolio indicator is True and Collateral portfolio code (variation margin) is not NOAP (Paragraph 698(c)).
valueRules: Value NOAP ('not applicable') is reported if not collateralised in a portfolio, or not collateralised at all (Paragraph 691).
